Name: LMArena (Chatbot Arena)
Description: Crowdsourced head-to-head model comparisons rated with an Elo-style score — the closest thing to a real-world 'which model feels better' leaderboard.

Name: Open LLM Leaderboard
Description: Hugging Face's leaderboard for open-weight models across a standard suite of academic benchmarks.

Name: MMLU / MMLU-Pro
Description: Multiple-choice questions spanning 57+ subjects (law, medicine, math, history…) — the standard 'general knowledge' benchmark.

Name: SWE-bench
Description: Can the model resolve real GitHub issues end-to-end? The benchmark coding agents actually care about.

Name: HumanEval / MBPP
Description: Function-level code generation correctness — older but still widely reported.

Name: GPQA Diamond
Description: Graduate-level science questions written to be 'Google-proof' — a harder reasoning bar than MMLU.

Name: Papers with Code — SOTA
Description: State-of-the-art tracker across hundreds of ML tasks, linked to the paper and code for each result.

Name: LMArena Vision leaderboard
Description: Same Arena methodology, for image-input models.
